prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were computed for nitrobenzene (14 atoms, charge 0, multiplicity 1) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', PySCF RKS backend, density-fit RI) in the gas phase. Partial charges were computed via the Mulliken scheme (PySCF); N±1 states (cation/anion) were computed at multiplicity 2 (doublet) by finite difference.

Method provenance: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, used as-is (no re-optimization). Software: PySCF (chemkit DFT backend). SCF converged. Integrity: trustworthy = true.
